reviews.review_body: Nice environment for Well growing students. Well educated teachers nice management

reviews.school_name: Vishwa Bharati Public School - Knowledge Park I
reviews.author: Ansh Tiwari
reviews.review_body: No facilities are provided, neither the staffs are capable, even labs aren't worth the fees. In such heat waves classes must be air conditioned atleast. Total Waste of Money, better enroll your child in sub urban schools they've far better facilities in this price .

reviews.school_name: Vishwa Bharati Public School - Knowledge Park I
reviews.author: Hameed Khan
reviews.review_body: We are new to Vishwa Bharati school and so far my child has seen the school just once, looking at the fact we were worried that how she will be adjusted to new teachers online, but my child has become very comfortable in just a few days and her participation become very active. I’m really aware of the fact that how this pandemic has changed the lives, but looking into a very positive aspect that “Education has taken another leap” I thank your energetic and sportive team of TEACHERS and STAFF for the efforts putting together to teach our children, finishing the syllabus but also ensuring that each kid is learning properly and my dear Asma studying in class 3rd enjoyed the co-curricular activities which took place along with main subjects. I can simply say your team has successfully transited this pandemic; I really appreciate the teacher’s patience and happy conversation with children as I understand the challenges behind the screen, for the teachers. Thank you for all your efforts by the whole TEAM.

reviews.school_name: Vishwa Bharati Public School - Knowledge Park I
reviews.author: anuja gupta
reviews.review_body: Vishwa Bharati Public School has proven to be the best gift in my child's life. Right from Principal Ma'am to all other faculty members each and everyone is always accessible and so considerate about the kids. All the teachers here give special attention to each and every child. Apart from academics kids are encouraged to participate in extra curricular activities as well giving them an overall exposure. I genuinely am delighted to have my kid as a part of this institution.

reviews.school_name: Vishwa Bharati Public School - Knowledge Park I
reviews.author: vatchu arun
reviews.review_body: My daughter studying in third grade in this school, she has lots of assignments are fun, interactive and challenging. The assignments instructions are great that the teacher guides the children through out. However, excelling in this environment requires attentiveness hardwork and dedication from both sides Parent as well as students. Especially in this pandemic the teacher of her class are beyond our expectations. Initially we wonder how they're going to adapt soon I realize that teacher's makes us happy. I highly recommend school to other friends looking for an engaging place dedicated to thoughtful educating your children.
